_comment: CCI ref/encl invalid fixture: Same item appears in both reference and enclosure lists.
body: 1. Per reference (a), SECNAV Manual 5216.5 Correspondence Manual, all units shall comply with established correspondence standards.
2. Additionally, per reference (b), OPNAVINST 5216.5 Correspondence Instructions, administrative procedures must be reviewed annually.
3. Enclosure (1), SECNAV Manual 5216.5 Correspondence Manual, is provided for your review.
4. Enclosure (2), Administrative Action Review Checklist, provides a checklist for administrative review.
